Event: The Prince of Darkness Castle Siege
Event Date: 04/04/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: T104


Other locations the gear can be found
Heroic Challenge - Castle Siege
Crowned Ruby Totem

Once in a while, the unit tears through the armor of 2 enemies with the highest spell power. When the enemy's armor is torn, that enemy takes 175000 pure damage and has their physical armor reduced by 35% for 4 sec.
Also, that enemy takes 250000 physical damage over 4 sec.

Requirements: 90
